Call of the Hero  

Description

1: Summon PC

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 500 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 12 Recast Time: 15
Fizzle Time: 4 Range: 20000
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Single Party Member
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso steps into a mystic portal.

Game Description

Conjures a mystical portal that summons one of your allies to your side. The target must be in your group to be summoned. Consumes a pearl when cast.

Reagents

  • Pearl x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Call of the Hero

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Call of the Hero
ClassLevel
MAG55
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (22)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (22)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots

Camping Gullerback in Burning Woods
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2009 at 5:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1716164186677
Guru
610 posts
If camping Gullerback for COTH in Burning Woods,he paths a lot just SSW to South of Giant fort near a crater.Have seen him spawn on the Western slope of the abovementioned crater a couple times.Killed him numerous times while levelling Alts in that area.Was killing Skellies,Gorillas and the odd Worm. Not sure which mob spawned him.

Edited, Nov 26th 2009 6:52pm by hexeez

Edited, Nov 26th 2009 6:55pm by hexeez

Camped at the Mushroom King for the Fungi Tunic, CoH dropped off a Mushroom Reaver in the Tower area, but Reavers are everywhere in that part of the zone.

COTH
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2004 at 1:56 PM Rating: Decent

It also doesn't work in the Deep. Tried to pull a team mate from the chasm and got the no hero's here whisper...

wonder if he is still down there?
▲ Page top
CoTH
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2004 at 10:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591787924609
3 posts
Here is another use for this spell.

Have a shaman or necro - use high lvl dots on a mob and chain cast CoTH. You get to dot something with no agro. Rinse and repeat - what will you kill next?
▲ Page top
RE: CoTH
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2004 at 1:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1679271392283
Scholar
308 posts
Unfortunately, it doesnt work like that. Once the next tick goes off on the Dots, your friend shammie or necro gets aggro again. It's cheaper manawise and reagentwise just to kite the thing, as I'm sure you'll never find a Mage who'll be willing to waste that many pearls.

The only real uses for this spell are the ones listed below. Have your MT get all the aggro on an overpull, then have him/her run away and CotH him/her back.

Just a note- This spell does not work in non-combat zones, in my experience. PoK, PoT, Bazaar, and Nexus have all been tested and it gives the message:

A voice whispers in your mind: "There are no heroes here..."

So I guess it's only zones that have the possiblity of combat?
▲ Page top
RE: CoTH
QuoteReply
# May 11 2005 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591829695038
2 posts
I believe it does work in PoK. I was grouped with a mage about a week ago who dinged 55. As I was in PoK getting ready to camp next to the small bank, I suddenly appeared next to him on the other side of the zone next to the jewelry supply vendors. Interesting thing is that it didn't interrupt my camp cycle, and since I was at 5 seconds I didn't have time to ask any questions.
▲ Page top
Reagent

# Nov 21 2003 at 10:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258819797
24 posts
Does this spell have a reagent cost?
▲ Page top
Reagent
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2010 at 7:25 PM Rating: Decent
Kornathia
7 posts
Yes, the pearls can be bought from a vendor in PoK for cheap. I buy stacks of 100 on my mage for around 440 pp/stack. Normally I buy 2 or 3 stacks at a time since I abuse the spell and multi box 5 to 7 toons at a time. But a merchant near the fishing pond between GL and bazz ramps has them. ;)
▲ Page top
RE: Reagent

# Jan 06 2004 at 12:24 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251550403
Sage
215 posts
Yes - A pearl.
▲ Page top
Great spell
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2003 at 5:07 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592258647715
227 posts
Mages, this spell is uber. If you don't already own it, get it now. You'll be using it now and when you hit 65.

Appears to have the effect of clearing agro also. In other words, if your puller gets too many adds, he can just run AWAY from the party, dragging the adds along with. You can then summon him and, poof, clear agro. The party is good, the puller is good, the mobs are far away.
▲ Page top
RE: Great spell
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2004 at 7:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801614672
61 posts
I am told you can use this spell to pull Phinny to zoneline in Kedge Keep without losing agro.

Swim over top and use a low agro dot and coth up to zone and phinny will be there shortly... alone

Edited, Sun Nov 7 07:36:26 2004

▲ Page top
?
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2003 at 5:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362346838
55 posts
So, this is like a reverse TL? you can port someon from somewhere to you? Is that how it works?
I'm 4 levels shy of getting it at this time but I'm told its a must.

Ocularis Infernum
51 Mage
Karana Server
LFG... Looking for guild.

Edited, Sat Apr 26 18:15:09 2003
▲ Page top
RE: ?
QuoteReply
# May 12 2003 at 2:50 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1594570761161
Guru
142 posts
It is useful but it has rules. It is a must, though. One of the class defining spells we get, and very useful in many situations.

It will summon a group member to you. You have to have the group leader be an "anchor" at zoneline or wherever you are pulling people FROM. They invite a person to group, then you cast CoH to bring them to you. When everyone is assembled, pull the anchor last.

A couple of high level zones have CoH disabled (Plane of Sky comes to mind) so that you "don't skip important content".

Another important thing this spell does is clear aggro. If a tank gets in trouble or a puller gets too many, they can call for a CoH and you can summon them to you safely and without anything still mad at it. The target has to be further than 200ft away or the aggro will remain.
▲ Page top
RE: ?
QuoteReply
# May 10 2003 at 4:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362248078
14 posts
yep, its a 30,000 foot-radius TL from group member to you, especially useful in dungeons (some dont let you use it) and pulling a friend across west karana :P

(only works as long as member is in same zone)
